# System Architecture Knowledge Base

> **Purpose**: System architecture design patterns, technology selection, implementation planning, and trade-off analysis
> **MCP Validated**: 2026-02-17

## Quick Navigation

### Concepts (< 150 lines each)

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| [concepts/design-patterns.md](concepts/design-patterns.md) | Common architecture patterns: layered, microservices, event-driven, CQRS |
| [concepts/technology-selection.md](concepts/technology-selection.md) | Evaluating and selecting technologies with structured criteria |
| [concepts/scalability.md](concepts/scalability.md) | Horizontal/vertical scaling strategies, caching, sharding |

### Patterns (< 200 lines each)

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| [patterns/implementation-plan.md](patterns/implementation-plan.md) | Multi-phase implementation plan template with milestones |
| [patterns/trade-off-analysis.md](patterns/trade-off-analysis.md) | Decision matrix pattern for architectural trade-offs |
| [patterns/system-design.md](patterns/system-design.md) | End-to-end system design process with ASCII diagrams |

### Specs (Machine-Readable)

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| [specs/architecture-templates.yaml](specs/architecture-templates.yaml) | Architecture decision records and design templates |

## Quick Reference

- [quick-reference.md](quick-reference.md) - Fast lookup tables for patterns, principles, and decision matrices

---

## Key Concepts

| Concept | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| **Design Patterns** | Proven structural blueprints: layered, microservices, event-driven, hexagonal |
| **Technology Selection** | Criteria-driven evaluation framework for choosing technologies |
| **Scalability** | Strategies for handling growth: horizontal, vertical, caching, partitioning |
| **Trade-off Analysis** | Structured comparison of architectural alternatives using weighted criteria |
| **Implementation Planning** | Phased delivery plans with dependencies, milestones, and risk mitigation |

---

## Learning Path

| Level | Files |
|-------|-------|
| **Beginner** | concepts/design-patterns.md, concepts/scalability.md |
| **Intermediate** | concepts/technology-selection.md, patterns/trade-off-analysis.md |
| **Advanced** | patterns/system-design.md, patterns/implementation-plan.md |

## Agent Usage

| Agent | Primary Files | Use Case |
|-------|---------------|----------|
| the-planner | patterns/implementation-plan.md, patterns/system-design.md | Create architecture plans and implementation roadmaps |
| the-planner | patterns/trade-off-analysis.md, concepts/technology-selection.md | Evaluate technology choices and architectural trade-offs |
